name: CalciMedica, Inc.
business: CalciMedica, Inc. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing therapeutics for serious illnesses driven by inflammatory and immunologic processes and direct cellular damage. Its product candidates target calcium release-activated calcium (CRAC) channels, with lead candidate Auxora being evaluated in multiple Phase 2 clinical trials across acute critical care settings. The company has never generated any revenue from product sales and has a history of net losses.
sellsTo: patients with acute inflammatory and immunologic diseases

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing therapeutics for serious illnesses driven by inflammatory and immunologic processes and direct cellular damage.

catalysts.event: Finalize pivotal program design in AP
catalysts.sentence: We expect to finalize the pivotal program design in the first half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Discuss KOURAGE data with FDA for AKI
catalysts.sentence: We plan to discuss the KOURAGE data and potential future development in AKI with the FDA in the second quarter of 2026.

Our current nonclinical development efforts are focused on CM5480, a CRAC channel inhibitor being advanced for the treatment of PAH, with submission of an Investigational New Drug application ( IND ) currently anticipated in 2027.
